---
name: Docs question or suggestion
about: Ask for clarification about the Diataxis compass or this skill, or suggest a wording change.
title: "[docs] "
labels: docs
---

## Where

Link the file and section. For example, `SKILL.md#the-diataxis-compass`.

## Current wording

> paste the current text here

## Problem

What is confusing, wrong, or could be clearer.

## Proposed wording

> paste the new text here, or describe the change

## Rationale

One or two sentences on why this is better. Tie it back to the official Diataxis source if relevant.
